files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.AzureDevopsPipelines.DevopsExpressionFormatter
files.Summary: Renders trees using Azure DevOps expression syntax: logic and comparison operators render as functions (and(...), or(...), not(...), eq(...), ne(...), lt(...), …), becomes a compile-time template expression ${{ ... }}, becomes a runtime expression $[ ... ], and becomes a macro expansion $(variable). Step and job references render against the steps. and dependencies. contexts.

files.Summary: Wraps a variable name to be expanded using Azure DevOps macro syntax: $(variableName)

files.Summary: Reference to a variable template file.

files.Summary: A variable definition that can be a named variable, variable group, or template reference.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.AzureDevopsPipelines.DevopsPipelineModel.Variables.Variables.Dictionary
files.Summary: Define variables using name/value pairs (mapping syntax).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.AzureDevopsPipelines.DevopsPipelineModel.Variables.Variables.VariableList
files.Summary: Define variables by name, variable group, or in a template (list syntax).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.AzureDevopsPipelines.DevopsPipelineModel.Variables.Variables
files.Summary: Define variables using name/value pairs or variable lists.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.AzureDevopsPipelines.DevopsPipelineWriter
files.Summary: Serializes a model to Azure Pipelines YAML. Expressions embedded in the model are rendered with .

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.AzureDevopsPipelines.DevopsRuntimeExpression
files.Summary: Wraps an expression to be evaluated at runtime using Azure DevOps runtime expression syntax: $[ expression ]

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.AndExpression
files.Summary: Logical AND over Source. The platform formatter decides the rendered syntax (e.g. a && b or and(a, b)).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.BooleanExpression
files.Summary: A boolean literal, rendered as true or false.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.CastExpression<TTo>
files.Summary: Wraps an expression to reinterpret its result type at compile time. The formatter should treat this transparently — it simply delegates to the inner expression.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.CoalesceExpression
files.Summary: Returns the first non-empty value of Source, rendered as coalesce(...).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.ConcatExpression
files.Summary: Concatenates the rendered text of Values with no separator. Handled directly by , so it works on every platform.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.ContainsExpression
files.Summary: Tests whether Source contains Pattern, rendered as contains(source, pattern).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.EndsWithExpression
files.Summary: Tests whether Source ends with Pattern, rendered as endsWith(source, pattern).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.EqualExpression
files.Summary: Equality comparison. The platform formatter decides the rendered syntax (e.g. left == right or eq(left, right)).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.EvaluateExpression
files.Summary: Marks Expression for evaluation in the target platform's expression context.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.FormatExpression
files.Summary: Replaces placeholders ({0}, {1}, …) in Source with Arguments, rendered as format(source, args...). Usually built via TextExpressions.Format($"...") string interpolation.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.GreaterThanExpression
files.Summary: Greater-than comparison. The platform formatter decides the rendered syntax (e.g. left > right or gt(left, right)).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.GreaterThanOrEqualToExpression
files.Summary: Greater-than-or-equal comparison. The platform formatter decides the rendered syntax (e.g. left >= right or ge(left, right)).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.HashFilesExpression
files.Summary: Returns a hash of the files matched by the glob pattern(s) in Source, rendered as hashFiles(source). Commonly used for cache keys.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.ITextExpression<TResult>
files.Summary: Marker interface that documents the result type an expression is expected to resolve to. The type parameter is a compile-time hint only; it has no effect on formatting.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.ITextExpressionFormatter
files.Summary: Renders a tree into platform-specific text.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.IndexAccessExpression
files.Summary: Accesses an element of Array by Index, rendered as array[index].

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.JoinExpression
files.Summary: Joins the elements of the array-valued Source with OptionalSeparator (comma when omitted), rendered as join(source, separator).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.LessThanExpression
files.Summary: Less-than comparison. The platform formatter decides the rendered syntax (e.g. left < right or lt(left, right)).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.LessThanOrEqualToExpression
files.Summary: Less-than-or-equal comparison. The platform formatter decides the rendered syntax (e.g. left <= right or le(left, right)).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.NotEqualExpression
files.Summary: Inequality comparison. The platform formatter decides the rendered syntax (e.g. left != right or ne(left, right)).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.NotExpression
files.Summary: Logical negation of Source. The platform formatter decides the rendered syntax (e.g. prefix ! or not(source)).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.NullExpression
files.Summary: The null literal, rendered as empty text.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.NumberExpression
files.Summary: A numeric literal, rendered using the invariant culture.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.OrExpression
files.Summary: Logical OR over Source. The platform formatter decides the rendered syntax (e.g. a || b or or(a, b)).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.PropertyAccessExpression
files.Summary: Accesses Property of Object, rendered as object.property.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.RawExpression
files.Summary: Verbatim, uninterpreted text. The formatter writes exactly as-is. Use this for plain YAML values and context path references; use for quoted string literals inside expressions.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.StartsWithExpression
files.Summary: Tests whether Source starts with Pattern, rendered as startsWith(source, pattern).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.StepOutcomeExpression
files.Summary: References the outcome of a step in the current job, rendered as steps.<step>.outcome. Compare against a .

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.StepOutcomeTypeExpression.OutcomeType
files.Summary: The possible outcomes of a step.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.StepOutcomeTypeExpression
files.Summary: A step outcome literal for comparison with . The platform formatter renders the appropriate outcome string for the target platform.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.StepOutputExpression
files.Summary: References an output of a step in the current job. The platform formatter renders the appropriate context path for the target platform.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.StringExpression
files.Summary: A string literal inside an expression, rendered with quotes (e.g. 'value'). Use for verbatim, unquoted text.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.TargetOutcomeExpression
files.Summary: References the outcome (result/status) of another job or stage. The platform formatter renders the appropriate context path for the target platform. Compare against a .

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.TargetOutcomeTypeExpression.OutcomeType
files.Summary: The possible outcomes of a job or stage.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.TargetOutcomeTypeExpression
files.Summary: A job/stage outcome literal for comparison with . The platform formatter renders the appropriate outcome string for the target platform.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.TargetOutputExpression
files.Summary: References an output of another job or stage. The platform formatter renders the appropriate context path for the target platform.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.TextExpression
files.Summary: The base type of the platform-agnostic expression tree. Expressions are immutable records composed via fluent methods and operators, then rendered to platform-specific text by a .

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.TextExpressionCollection
files.Summary: An ordered collection of instances. Implicit conversions from , string[], , and single expressions allow model properties to be assigned naturally, e.g. Run = ["dotnet build"] or Branches = ["main"].

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.TextExpressionFormatter
files.Summary: Base class for platform-specific expression formatters.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.TextExpressionInterpolatedStringHandler
files.Summary: An interpolated string handler that creates a from an interpolated string. Literal parts are combined into a format string with placeholders, and holes become arguments.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.TextExpressionUtils
files.Summary: Utility helpers for working with sequences and trees of .

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.TextExpressions
files.Summary: The entry point for creating instances. Factory members (Raw, From, Format, Concat, True, False, Null, …) are attached to this class via extension members in .

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.ToJsonExpression
files.Summary: Converts Source to its JSON representation, rendered as the platform's JSON serialization function.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.WorkflowExpression<T>
files.Summary: A typed workflow expression that documents the expected result type of the expression. The type parameter serves as a compile-time hint for what the expression resolves to.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.WorkflowExpressionCollection<T>
files.Summary: A typed workflow expression collection that documents the expected element result type. The type parameter serves as a compile-time hint for what each expression resolves to.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.Expressions.WorkflowExpressionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension members that augment and with factory helpers for building expression trees.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.BranchNameSeparator
files.Summary: Branch name separator.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.CommitMessageInclude
files.Summary: Commit message include option.

files.Summary: Allow rule for Dependabot updates.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.DependabotCommitMessage
files.Summary: Commit message preferences for Dependabot.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.DependabotConfig
files.Summary: GitHub Dependabot v2 configuration.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.DependabotCooldown
files.Summary: Cooldown configuration for dependency updates.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.DependabotGroup
files.Summary: Group configuration for dependencies.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.DependabotIgnore
files.Summary: Ignore rule for Dependabot updates.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.DependabotMultiEcosystemGroup
files.Summary: Multi-ecosystem group configuration that spans multiple package ecosystems.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.DependabotPullRequestBranchName
files.Summary: Pull request branch name preferences.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.DependabotRegistries
files.Summary: Registries to use for this update configuration. Can be a list of registry names or "*" for all.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.DependabotRegistry
files.Summary: Private package registry configuration.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.DependabotSchedule
files.Summary: Schedule preferences for Dependabot updates.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.DependabotUpdate
files.Summary: Package ecosystem configuration for Dependabot updates.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.DependabotVersions
files.Summary: Versions to ignore. Can be a single version string or a list of version strings.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.DependencyType
files.Summary: Dependency type for allow/ignore rules.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.GroupAppliesTo
files.Summary: Specifies whether the rules in the group apply to version updates or security updates.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.GroupBy
files.Summary: Configure how dependencies are grouped.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.GroupDependencyType
files.Summary: Dependency type for groups.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.GroupUpdateType
files.Summary: Semantic versioning update type.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.InsecureExternalCodeExecution
files.Summary: Allow or deny code execution in manifest files.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.PackageEcosystem
files.Summary: Package ecosystem values for Dependabot.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.RebaseStrategy
files.Summary: Rebase strategy for Dependabot.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.RegistryType
files.Summary: Registry type for Dependabot.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.ScheduleDay
files.Summary: Schedule day for Dependabot updates.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.ScheduleInterval
files.Summary: Schedule interval for Dependabot updates.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.SemverUpdateType
files.Summary: Semantic version update type.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigModel.Model.VersioningStrategy
files.Summary: How to update manifest version requirements.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.DependabotConfigWriter
files.Summary: Serializes a model to Dependabot v2 configuration YAML (.github/dependabot.yml).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.Concurrency
files.Summary: Concurrency settings (concurrency) that ensure only one run (or queued run) sharing the same group executes at a time, at either workflow or job level.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.Container
files.Summary: A Docker container that a job runs in (container) or that hosts a service (services).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.Credentials
files.Summary: Credentials for a private container registry (credentials), passed to docker login. Typically reference secrets, e.g. ${{ secrets.REGISTRY_PASSWORD }}.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.Environment
files.Summary: The deployment environment a job targets (environment). Environments can carry protection rules and secrets configured in the repository settings.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.GithubAction
files.Summary: The root model of a GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/*.yml). Serialize it with .

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.Job
files.Summary: A job within a workflow: a set of steps that execute on the same runner.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.Matrix
files.Summary: A matrix of variable combinations to run a job with (strategy.matrix).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.On.BranchProtectionRule.BranchProtectionType
files.Summary: Activity types for the branch_protection_rule event.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.On.BranchProtectionRule
files.Summary: Triggers when a branch protection rule changes (branch_protection_rule).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.On.CheckRun.CheckRunType
files.Summary: Activity types for the check_run event.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.On.CheckRun
files.Summary: Triggers on check run activity (check_run).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.On.CheckSuite.CheckSuiteType
files.Summary: Activity types for the check_suite event.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.On.CheckSuite
files.Summary: Triggers on check suite activity (check_suite).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.On.Create
files.Summary: Triggers when a branch or tag is created (create).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.On.Delete
files.Summary: Triggers when a branch or tag is deleted (delete).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.On.Deployment
files.Summary: Triggers when a deployment is created (deployment).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.On.DeploymentStatus
files.Summary: Triggers when a deployment status is provided (deployment_status).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.On.Push
files.Summary: Triggers when commits or tags are pushed (push), with optional branch/tag/path filters. All filter properties are required so that omissions are explicit; pass null for filters you do not want.

files.Summary: Allows the workflow to be called from another workflow (workflow_call), making it a reusable workflow.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.On.WorkflowDispatch
files.Summary: Allows the workflow to be run manually from the GitHub UI or API (workflow_dispatch).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.On.WorkflowRun.WorkflowDispatchTypes
files.Summary: Activity types for the workflow_run event.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.On.WorkflowRun
files.Summary: Triggers when another workflow runs (workflow_run).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.On
files.Summary: A workflow trigger event (on). This is a discriminated union over the GitHub webhook events; construct the variant for the event you want, e.g. new On.Push { ... } or new On.Schedule(["0 6 * * 1"]). Enum member names intentionally match the lowercase/snake_case activity-type strings used in workflow YAML.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.Permissions.All
files.Summary: Grants the same Level to every permission scope, rendered as read-all or write-all.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.Permissions.Exact
files.Summary: Grants explicit levels for individual permission scopes.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.Permissions
files.Summary: GITHUB_TOKEN permissions at workflow or job level (permissions). This is a discriminated union: use to grant one level to every scope (read-all / write-all), or to specify levels per scope.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.PermissionsEvent
files.Summary: Per-scope GITHUB_TOKEN permission levels. Scopes left null are omitted from the YAML and fall back to GitHub's defaults.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.PermissionsLevel
files.Summary: The access level granted to a GITHUB_TOKEN permission scope.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.RunsOn
files.Summary: The runner selection for a job (runs-on).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.Snapshot
files.Summary: Runner image snapshot settings for a job (snapshot), used to capture the runner state as a custom image after the job completes.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.Step.RunStep
files.Summary: A step that runs shell commands (run).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.Step.UsesStep
files.Summary: A step that runs a reusable action (uses), e.g. actions/checkout. Provide inputs via .

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.Step
files.Summary: A single step within a job. This is a discriminated union: construct a to run an action or a to run shell commands. The properties on this base record are shared by both variants.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.Strategy
files.Summary: The execution strategy for a job (strategy), defining a matrix of variations to run.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.WorkflowDispatchInput.Boolean
files.Summary: A true/false input (type: boolean).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.WorkflowDispatchInput.Choice
files.Summary: A dropdown input restricted to a set of options (type: choice).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.WorkflowDispatchInput.Number
files.Summary: A numeric input (type: number).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.WorkflowDispatchInput.String
files.Summary: A free-text input (type: string).

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionModel.WorkflowDispatchInput
files.Summary: A typed input for the workflow_dispatch trigger. This is a discriminated union; construct , , , or for the desired input type.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubActionWriter
files.Summary: Serializes a model to GitHub Actions workflow YAML. Expressions embedded in the model are rendered with .

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.GithubActions.GithubExpressionFormatter
files.Summary: Renders trees using GitHub Actions expression syntax: becomes ${{ ... }}, logic operators use && / || / !, comparisons use == / != / < / …, and functions render as contains(...), format(...), hashFiles(...), etc. Step and job references render against the steps. and needs. contexts.

files.Title: Invex.StructuredText.StructuredTextWriter
files.Summary: An indentation-aware text writer for producing structured text such as YAML. Indentation is managed through disposable scopes returned by , so the nesting of the generating code mirrors the nesting of the generated output.
